01 — About

From the hills.
To the boardroom.

From the mountains of Uttarakhand to the agency floors of Gurgaon — one agenda: marketing. I finished my BBA at LPU in June 2025, then joined Nothing Else Matters as an Operations & Client Servicing Intern, where I spent 7 months running three brand accounts, tracking 900M+ impressions, and handling ORM for Sennheiser and Livguard.

2022 – Jun 2025
BBA · Lovely Professional University — graduated, explored marketing, tried building a fashion brand on Instagram during final year (2024)
Oct 2025 – Apr 2026
Operations & Client Servicing Intern · Nothing Else Matters, Gurgaon — ran Sennheiser India & Livguard Energy accounts, coordinated 7 campaigns, handled 2000+ ORM queries
Now · Open
Looking for full-time roles — Account Executive · Marketing Executive · Client Servicing · Delhi NCR

I believe marketing is a craft, not a job title. You learn it by doing it.

You don't learn to walk by following rules. You learn by doing and by falling over.
— Richard Branson · Founder, Virgin Group · My biggest marketing inspiration
Only a fool never changes his mind.

03 — My brand

Tried building
something during college.

College experiment · Instagram · 2024

Personal Fashion Brand

During my final year of college in 2024, I tried building a fashion brand on Instagram entirely on my own — before I even started my internship. It was my first real attempt at applying what I was learning about branding, content, and audience building in an actual context rather than just a classroom.

I handled everything independently — naming, visual identity, content creation, and social management. It wasn't polished or a full-scale startup, but it taught me more about what marketing actually feels like than any assignment did.

Brand naming & identity Visual direction Content creation Social media management Community building
Solo
Built entirely independently — no team, no budget
2024
During final year of BBA at LPU
Everything
Identity · content · copy · social management — all me
04 — Other projects

Beyond the agency.

[Venture]Jan 2024 – May 2025

New Venture Creation — eco-friendly cleaning brand

Co-founded as part of LPU's venture-creation program. Led market research to validate demand, shaped product positioning, and built the business model from idea through pitch.

[Accounting]May – Jul 2024

Junior Accountant Intern — Kapkoti & Associates

Processed accounting entries, maintained client records, and supported relationship management during college.

[Fieldwork]Mar – Apr 2025

Farmer crop survey — Indian Agribusiness Systems Ltd

Collected crop yield and finance data directly from farmers on the ground, feeding into rural market analysis.

[Community]Jun – Jul 2023

Waste management campaign — Volunteer Lead

Led awareness campaigns and cleanup drives, mobilizing community participation with no budget and no formal authority.
